description: Delete 10 stub service directories, update CI/CD workflows and Helm charts to remove references to deleted services, create git branch, and regenerate lockfile
steps: Delete 10 stub service directories: services/ads-api, services/ai-api, services/chat-api, services/edits-api, services/identity, services/mail-api, services/max-api, services/neon-api, services/sync-api, services/tube-api

Update .github/workflows/ci.yml: In the docker-build job matrix, remove all 10 deleted services (identity, chat-api, mail-api, ai-api, sync-api, ads-api, tube-api, neon-api, edits-api, max-api). Keep only ws-gateway plus the 7 other kept services that have Dockerfiles (cdc-relay, ci-runner, git-server, matchmaking, moderation-worker, search-indexer, smtp-inbound) - but only include services that actually have a Dockerfile. Check which of the 8 kept services have Dockerfiles.

Update .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml: Remove deleted services from the build-and-push matrix and from the smoke-test health check loop. Keep only services that still exist and have Dockerfiles.
Update .github/workflows/deploy-production.yml: Update SERVICES lists in 'Verify images exist in ECR' step and 'Check canary health' step to only include kept services with Dockerfiles.

Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values.yaml: Remove the service blocks for chat-api, mail-api, ai-api, sync-api, ads-api (and any other deleted service entries). Keep identity-related entries ONLY if they refer to @quant/identity-permissions package (not the service). Keep ws-gateway.
Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values-staging.yaml: Remove entries for deleted services.
Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values-production.yaml: Remove entries for deleted services.
Update infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/ingress.yaml: Remove ingress rules pointing to deleted services (chat-api, mail-api, ai-api, sync-api, ads-api).
Run pnpm install to regenerate the lockfile without the deleted workspace packages.
Run pnpm typecheck to verify no compilation errors from the deletions.
Run pnpm test to verify all remaining tests pass.
Run pnpm lint to verify lint passes.
acceptance_criteria: The 10 stub service directories no longer exist
pnpm install succeeds and lockfile is updated
CI workflow only references services that exist
Deploy workflows only reference services that exist
verification: Run: pnpm install && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint
Verify deleted directories don't exist: ls services/ads-api should fail
Grep CI yaml for deleted service names to confirm removal
findings: Build required @quant/common to be compiled first (its dist/ was missing). Running pnpm build resolved this as turbo handles the dependency order. All gates pass: build 63/63, typecheck 88/88, test 91/91, lint 73/73. Only ws-gateway among kept services has a Dockerfile. Pre-commit hook ran prettier on staged files.
